race.description: Ladbrokes Inter Dominion Pacing Champs Ht1 (L)
race.comment: MINOS NZ (11) has been good since heading north. Won two back at this circuit and distance and was a real eye-catcher when charging home for third behind series favourites Leap To Fame and The Janitor last start, beaten only 2.5m. Tougher draw but with luck his form should stack up. Last year's Eureka winner BAY OF BISCAY (3) brings consistent form from Victoria. Scored from the second row two back then drew wider than this when beaten 1.2m into second at Melton last start. Loves this distance with two wins and a placing from three attempts and should get his chance from this draw. CAPTAINS KNOCK (9) makes his first appearance since a brave fourth in The Race in NZ. Back row draw but hasn't missed a place in seven fresh attempts, winning four. Nullarbor winner MAX DELIGHT (1) also goes well fresh and was readied with two solid trials. Gets the ace draw so can make an impact.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $40,000
